title: Claude Plans, Gemini Designs: One Workflow for Beautiful Frontends (LIVE)
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates a multi-model AI coding workflow using Archon that combines Claude (Opus) for planning and backend work with Gemini 3.5 Flash for UI design to accelerate beautiful frontend development. The workflow chains planning, design, integration, and deployment stages across different models based on their strengths.
